name: Weekly Throughput
query:
SELECT
    date_trunc('week', v_facts.full_date)::date AS week_start_date,
    SUM(v_facts.value) AS total_completed
FROM metrics.v_facts
WHERE v_facts.calc_code = 'throughput_count'
  [[ AND {{issue_type}} -- ]] AND v_facts.slice_rule_id IS NULL
  [[AND {{project_key}}]]
  [[AND {{date_range}}]]
GROUP BY date_trunc('week', v_facts.full_date)::date
ORDER BY week_start_date
